ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Pineapple, in pineapple juice, canned, drained
Mango, flesh without skin, pitted, raw
Passion fruit, flesh without skin, with seeds, raw

ingredients_text: 60% apple juice from concentrate, 22,5% pineapple juice from concentrate, 12% orange juice from concentrate, 2% apricot puree, 1,5% mango puree concentrate, 1% banana puree, 0,5% guava puree, 0,5% passion fruit juice concentrate,
